Title: Verify API connection to User Interface Pages
Test Steps:
1. Send a GET request to the API endpoint.
2. Verify the response contains the expected user interface page data.
Expected Result: The API should return valid user interface page data.

Title: Validate API interaction with Repository/Controllers
Test Steps:
1. Send a POST request to the API with sample data.
2. Verify the Repository/Controllers component processes the request correctly.
Expected Result: The Repository/Controllers should process the request and return appropriate data.

Title: Ensure API communicates with MySQL Database
Test Steps:
1. Send a query to the API to interact with the MySQL database.
2. Verify the response from the database matches the expected results.
Expected Result: The API should return correct data from the MySQL database.

Title: Test API interaction with Bunny.io CDN
Test Steps:
1. Send a request to the API to access a resource hosted on Bunny.io.
2. Verify the response is served via Bunny.io CDN.
Expected Result: The resource should be served via Bunny.io CDN.

Title: Validate API interaction with Jobs Component
Test Steps:
1. Send a request to the API to trigger a background job.
2. Verify the job is processed by the Jobs component.
Expected Result: The background job should be successfully processed.

Title: Test API interaction with Real-time Communication Service
Test Steps:
1. Send a request to the API to initiate real-time communication.
2. Verify the real-time communication service is triggered.
Expected Result: Real-time communication should be initiated.

Title: Validate API interaction with Push Notifications System
Test Steps:
1. Send a request to the API to send a push notification.
2. Verify the push notification is delivered to the intended user.
Expected Result: The push notification should be successfully delivered.

Title: Verify Job Creation and Execution
Test Steps:
1. Create a new job instance.
2. Run the job.
3. Verify the job status changes to completed.
Expected Result: The job should complete successfully.

Title: Validate Job Batch Management
Test Steps:
1. Create a job batch.
2. Add jobs to the batch.
3. Execute the batch.
4. Verify all jobs in the batch are completed.
Expected Result: All jobs in the batch should complete successfully.

Title: Test Job Failure Handling
Test Steps:
1. Create a job that is expected to fail.
2. Run the job.
3. Verify the job status indicates failure.
Expected Result: The job should indicate a failure status.

Title: Validate User Registration Process
Test Data: Username: testuser, Email: test@example.com, Password: testpass
Test Steps:
1. Provide user details in the application.
2. Submit the registration form.
3. Verify the server saves the user data.
4. Verify the server generates and sends an OTP.
5. Enter the received OTP.
6. Verify the server confirms the OTP and returns an authentication token.
Expected Result: The user should be registered successfully, and an authentication token should be returned.

Title: Validate User Registration with Invalid Email
Test Data: Username: testuser, Email: invalidemail, Password: testpass
Test Steps:
1. Provide user details in the application.
2. Submit the registration form.
3. Verify the server rejects the registration due to invalid email.
Expected Result: The server should reject the registration due to an invalid email.

Title: Validate User Registration with Duplicate Email
Test Data: Username: testuser, Email: test@example.com, Password: testpass
Test Steps:
1. Register a user with the same email.
2. Attempt to register another user with the same email.
3. Verify the server rejects the second registration due to duplicate email.
Expected Result: The server should reject the second registration due to a duplicate email.

Title: Validate User Login Process
Preconditions: User is registered and has a valid email and password.
Test Data: Username: testuser, Email: test@example.com, Password: testpass
Test Steps:
1. Provide user credentials in the application.
2. Submit the login form.
3. Verify the server validates the email and password.
4. Verify the server generates and sends an authentication token.
5. Verify the application saves the token.
6. Verify the application opens the home screen.
Expected Result: The user should be logged in successfully, and the home screen should be opened.

Title: Validate User Login with Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: User is registered but has incorrect email or password.
Test Data: Username: testuser, Email: test@example.com, Password: wrongpass
Test Steps:
1. Provide user credentials in the application.
2. Submit the login form.
3. Verify the server rejects the login due to invalid credentials.
Expected Result: The server should reject the login due to invalid credentials.

Title: Validate User Login with Expired Token
Preconditions: User is logged in with a valid token.
Test Steps:
1. Provide the expired token in the application.
2. Submit the token.
3. Verify the server rejects the login due to an expired token.
Expected Result: The server should reject the login due to an expired token.

Title: Validate Password Recovery Process
Preconditions: User is registered and has a valid email.
Test Steps:
1. Request a password reset via the application.
2. Verify the server checks the email.
3. Verify the server generates and sends a reset token via email.
4. Verify the server saves the reset token in the database.
5. Verify the application sends the reset token to the user.
Expected Result: The user should receive an email with a password reset link.

Title: Validate Password Recovery with Invalid Email
Preconditions: User is registered but has an invalid email.
Test Steps:
1. Request a password reset via the application.
2. Verify the server rejects the request due to an invalid email.
Expected Result: The server should reject the password reset request due to an invalid email.

Title: Validate Password Recovery with Expired Token
Preconditions: User has requested a password reset and received a valid token.
Test Steps:
1. Submit the expired token and new password.
2. Verify the server rejects the password change due to an expired token.
Expected Result: The server should reject the password change due to an expired token.

Title: Validate Initial Card Loading
Test Steps:
1. Open the homepage.
2. Verify the application requests 10 cards from the server.
3. Verify the server requests 10 cards from the database.
4. Verify the server returns 10 cards to the application.
5. Verify the application displays the 10 cards.
Expected Result: The application should display 10 cards.

Title: Validate Card Loading with Swipe
Test Steps:
1. Swipe 5 cards.
2. Verify the application requests 5 more cards with an offset.
3. Verify the server requests 5 cards with an offset from the database.
4. Verify the server returns 5 cards to the application.
5. Verify the application displays the additional 5 cards.
Expected Result: The application should display 5 additional cards.

Title: Validate Matching Process Between Two Users
Preconditions: Two users are registered and have profiles.
Test Steps:
1. User 2 swipes right on User 1's profile.
2. Verify the server saves the preference in the database.
3. User 1 swipes right on User 2's profile.
4. Verify the server saves the preference in the database.
5. Verify the server checks for a match.
6. Verify the server notifies User 1 of a match and opens the chat.
7. Verify the application displays the match screen for both users.
Expected Result: Both users should be notified of a match and see the match screen.
